source: Curated from Wikidata, CIA World Factbook, EIU, Wikipedia (2024)

ambiguity_notes.australia/is_island_nation: Continent-island. Conventionally classified as continent, not island nation. Coded NO.
ambiguity_notes.canada/is_monarchy: Constitutional monarchy; King Charles III as head of state. Coded YES.
ambiguity_notes.ethiopia/landlocked: Landlocked since Eritrea independence (1993). Not coded as landlocked because 'landlocked' was not in the original 15 attrs and Ethiopia lacks 'has_coastline'. In 30-attr version, Ethiopia IS landlocked (no has_coastline, YES landlocked).
ambiguity_notes.ireland/is_island_nation: Republic of Ireland shares island with Northern Ireland (UK). Conventionally treated as island nation. Coded YES.
ambiguity_notes.israel/has_nuclear_weapons: Widely believed to possess ~90 warheads but never officially confirmed ('nuclear ambiguity' policy). Coded YES per intelligence consensus.
ambiguity_notes.japan/is_monarchy: Constitutional monarchy; Emperor is ceremonial head of state. Coded YES.
ambiguity_notes.japan/is_republic: Constitutional monarchy with Emperor. Coded NO (not a republic).
ambiguity_notes.nigeria/is_democracy: Regular elections with civilian government since 1999. Significant governance challenges. EIU 2024 ~4.1 (hybrid regime). Coded YES—borderline decision; multiparty elections are held.
ambiguity_notes.pakistan/has_official_english: English is co-official per Article 251 of constitution (alongside Urdu). Coded YES.
ambiguity_notes.russia/has_death_penalty: Moratorium since 1996 but not abolished. Coded YES (on books).
ambiguity_notes.russia/is_in_asia: Transcontinental; ~77% of territory in Asia. Coded YES.
ambiguity_notes.russia/is_in_europe: Transcontinental; capital Moscow in Europe, ~23% of territory in Europe. Coded YES—conventionally European in geopolitical context.
ambiguity_notes.singapore/is_democracy: One-party dominance (PAP) since independence. EIU 2024: flawed democracy (~6.0). Coded YES.
ambiguity_notes.spain/population_over_50M: ~48M in 2024, just under 50M threshold. Coded NO.
ambiguity_notes.switzerland/gdp_top_20: ~$900B GDP, roughly #20 globally. Edge case at the boundary. Coded YES.
ambiguity_notes.thailand/is_democracy: Civilian government restored after 2023 elections. Military influence persists. EIU 2024 ~6.5 (flawed democracy). Coded YES.
ambiguity_notes.turkey/is_NATO_founder: Joined NATO 1952, not founding 1949. Coded NO... wait, Turkey joined in 1952. Coded NO for is_NATO_founder.
ambiguity_notes.turkey/is_democracy: Formally democratic with elections. EIU 2024 classifies as hybrid regime (score ~4.4). Coded NO.
ambiguity_notes.turkey/is_in_europe: Transcontinental; ~3% in Europe (Thrace), ~97% in Asia. Coded NO for is_in_europe—geographic majority in Asia.
ambiguity_notes.united_states/has_death_penalty: Federal death penalty exists; most executions at state level. Coded YES.
ambiguity_notes.united_states/has_official_english: No official language at federal level. English is de facto but not de jure. Coded NO.
